title: Ultimate Modpack by Trijjy
description: It is the best modpack to increase FPS with also having other complementary stuff like shaders, mods, and RPs!
body:
It is the best mod pack to increase FPS with also having other complementary stuff like shaders, mods, and RPs!

It also includes my favourite world BanglaMine City 2! It is a showcase of the country Bangladesh located in South Asia.

It also contains my favourite mods Automobility, Supplementaries, Midnight Controls & Extras, Mod menu and more!

Automobility is a mod that allows you to drive cars in Minecraft! Supplementaries is a mod that allows you to have extra Vanilla+ items. Midnight Controls and the extras are for making suppport for a controller on Minecraft Fabric Java. Mod menu is a mod that creates a menu in Minecraft that shows you what mods you have and settings for them (Not included in Forge)! All the other mods you can see in the dependencies. 

You don't need Quilt, Fabric, or Forge to be installed on your device for any of these modpacks. They will auto install the modloaders so you don't have to. That's what a modpack is! You should try all of the modpacks and see which one is the best at performance for your device. For me it was quilt. BTW all of these modpacks have the same mods, RPs, shaders, and worlds. So all are the same except for the modloader. If your launcher does not support .mrpack then I have a [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ultimate-fps-by-trijjy "") that you can see as well, it is not the same name because the Moderators did not allow it so it is called Ultimate FPS by Trijjy. Everything is the same in the CurseForge page except for the name. 

Make sure to turn of VSync in Video Settings for the most FPS in both Fabric, Quilt, and Forge!

None of these mods, images, shaders, RP's, and worlds are owned or made by me so I don't take any responsibility for any damage to property. Anyone can distribute this mod but only without the same name.

Proudly Made in Canada!

🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

But I'm Bangladeshi!
